2604.24645.title: K-MetBench: A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Fine-Grained Evaluation of Expert Reasoning, Locality, and Multimodality in Meteorology
2604.24645.paper_summary: The development of practical (multimodal) large language model assistants for Korean weather forecasters is hindered by the absence of a multidimensional, expert-level evaluation framework grounded in authoritative sources. To address this, we introduce K-MetBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in national qualification exams. It exposes critical gaps across four dimensions: expert visual reasoning of charts, logical validity via expert-verified rationales, Korean-specific geo-cultural comprehension, and fine-grained domain analysis. Our evaluation of 55 models reveals a profound modality gap in interpreting specialized diagrams and a reasoning gap where models hallucinate logic despite correct predictions. Crucially, Korean models outperform significantly larger global models in local contexts, demonstrating that parameter scaling alone cannot resolve cultural dependencies. K-MetBench serves as a roadmap for developing reliable, culturally aware expert AI agents. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/soyeonbot/K-MetBench .
2604.24645.paper_summary_zh: 韓國氣象預報員的實用（多模態）大型語言模型助手的發展受到缺乏基於權威來源的多維度專家級評估框架的阻礙。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了 K-MetBench，一個基於國家資格考試的診斷基準。它揭示了四個維度中的關鍵差距：專家對圖表的視覺推理、通過專家驗證的推理的邏輯有效性、韓國特有的地理文化理解，以及細緻的領域分析。我們對 55 個模型的評估顯示，在解釋專業圖表方面存在深刻的模態差距，而在推理方面，模型儘管預測正確卻仍然產生邏輯幻覺。至關重要的是，在當地情境中，韓國模型的表現顯著優於規模更大的全球模型，顯示僅僅擴大參數無法解決文化依賴性。K-MetBench 作為開發可靠且具有文化意識的專家 AI 代理的路線圖。數據集可在 https://huggingface.co/datasets/soyeonbot/K-MetBench 獲得。
2604.24645.author: Soyeon Kim et.al.
2604.24645.authors: Soyeon Kim, Cheongwoong Kang, Myeongjin Lee, Eun-Chul Chang, Jaedeok Lee, Jaesik Choi
